Flexible Learning

Online & Offline Education Modes

Choose how you want to learn. Same quality curriculum, same ANITIO certification — online, offline, or hybrid.

Learn Anywhere

Online Classes

Attend live classes from your home. Ideal for students outside Delhi or with busy schedules.

  • Live video lectures
  • Recorded sessions
  • Digital study material
  • Online exam & result
  • WhatsApp support group
  • Same certificate
View Online Classes
Most Popular
In-Person Training

Offline Classes

Learn at our Dwarka More centre with expert trainers. 7 AM – 8 PM flexible batches.

  • Face-to-face learning
  • Hands-on lab practice
  • Printed study material
  • In-centre exam
  • Personal mentoring
  • Group discussions
View Offline Classes
Best of Both

Hybrid Mode

Mix of online and offline. Attend centre when possible, join online otherwise.

  • Attend online or offline
  • Switch mode anytime
  • Both recordings & labs
  • Flexible schedule
  • Dual access
  • Same fee structure
View Hybrid Mode

Examination System

Online & Offline Exam Process

Transparent, fair, and technology-driven examination system for all enrolled students.

Online Mode

Online Exam

Appear for your exam from anywhere using your laptop or mobile. Proctored and secure.

How It Works:

  1. 1Login to student portal with enrollment ID
  2. 2Select your course exam from the dashboard
  3. 3Attempt MCQ & descriptive questions online
  4. 4Submit exam — result published within 7 days
  5. 5Download your digital mark sheet & certificate
Attempt Online Exam
Offline Mode

In-Centre Exam

Appear at our Dwarka More examination centre. Scheduled batches, supervised environment.

How It Works:

  1. 1Receive exam schedule from your batch coordinator
  2. 2Arrive at the institute with admit card & ID proof
  3. 3Appear for written / practical / computer-based exam
  4. 4Results declared within 10–15 working days
  5. 5Collect physical mark sheet & certificate from centre
Schedule Offline Exam

Exam System Features

Secure & Proctored
Flexible Scheduling
Digital Certificates
Online Results Portal
Check Exam Results →
Why ANITIO?

Why Choose ANITIO Institute?

Since 2015, ANITIO has been the most trusted computer training institute in Dwarka More. Our focus is on practical skills, real industry exposure, and student success.

Expert Industry Faculty
Learn from experienced professionals with real industry background in IT, design, and finance.
Practical Hands-on Training
Each course includes project work, lab practice, and real-world assignments — not just theory.
100% Placement Support
Resume building, mock interviews, LinkedIn setup, and job referrals for every student.
Flexible Batch Timings
Choose from 7 AM to 8 PM slots on weekdays & weekends. Online, offline, and hybrid modes.
Comprehensive Study Material
Complete study kits — printed notes, digital resources, video lectures, and practice tests.
Small Batch Size
Limited students per batch ensures personalized attention from trainers for every learner.
Recognized Certification
Government-recognized and industry-accepted certificates that add real value to your CV.
Affordable Fee Structure
Best quality education at the most affordable fee. EMI options and scholarship available.
Explore Our Courses

What Our Students Say

5,000+ success stories and counting

"ANITIO changed my career! The practical training approach is excellent. I got placed as a Junior Developer within 2 months of completing the course. Faculty is very supportive."

R

Full Stack Web Development · Uttam Nagar

"The Excel course is outstanding. I learned Power BI, Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP and MIS reporting. Got promoted at my job immediately after! Best institute in Dwarka More."
